title: Apartment building fire — multiple floors, people on balconies
sentences: There's a fire in my apartment building, it's spreading fast.
I'm at the Riverside Arms complex on 4th Street, building B.
The fire started on the second floor and I can see flames on the third now.
There are people on the balconies on floors two through five, they can't get down.
The stairwell is full of smoke, nobody can use it safely.
I can hear a woman screaming from the fourth floor balcony.
At least twenty people are trapped that I can see, probably more inside.
